name: ab-test
title: A/B Test Video Titles & Thumbnails
description: Test different titles and thumbnails on existing videos to optimize CTR.

name: adversarial
title: Red Team Self-Testing
description: Run adversarial tests against the system to find weaknesses before they become failures.

name: analytics
title: Cross-Platform Analytics
description: Pull and display analytics from all content platforms.

name: audience
title: Audience Research & Personas
description: Build detailed audience personas to optimize content targeting.

name: audit
title: Vault Health Audit
description: Run vault audit, display dashboard, flag structural issues. Regenerate `Vault_Health.md`.

name: auto-publish
title: Syndicate Content to All Platforms
description: Publishes beacon blog posts to Bluesky, Mastodon, dev.to, Hashnode, and Telegram.

name: backlink
title: Backlink Strategy
description: Identify and pursue backlink opportunities for activemirror.ai SEO.

name: backup
title: Vault Backup Operations
description: Check backup age, run backup, verify integrity.

name: beacon
title: Manage Beacon Blog
description: Create, publish, and manage beacon blog posts for truth-first-beacon.

name: behind-scenes
title: Behind-the-Scenes Content
description: Generate BTS content showing the real human story behind the code.

name: benchmark
title: System Performance Benchmarks
description: Run quantitative benchmarks across the entire stack. Track over time. Detect regression.

name: brand
title: Brand Consistency Checker
description: Audit all platforms for consistent branding (name, bio, links, colors, messaging).

name: breakthrough
title: Track & Generate Novel Capabilities
description: Identify what's genuinely new in the stack — things no one else has built. Track breakthroughs over time. Generate new ones.

name: brief
title: Generate Sovereign Briefing
description: Scan HN, tech news, and crypto signals. Format per the Sovereign Brief pattern.

name: bus
title: Memory Bus Operations
description: Direct interface to the MirrorDNA Memory Bus — the single source of truth.

name: calibrate
title: Self-Benchmarking on Demand
description: Run the cognitive kernel CALIBRATE primitive and show twin performance metrics.

name: capability
title: System Capability Matrix
description: Generate a complete matrix of what the system can and cannot do. Find capability gaps.

name: carousel
title: Generate Social Media Carousel
description: Turn a build session into a swipeable carousel (images with text) for Instagram/LinkedIn/Bluesky.

name: cert
title: SSL Certificate Monitor
description: Check SSL certificate expiry for all live domains.

name: challenge
title: Create Coding Challenge Content
description: Generate a coding challenge video: "Can I build X in Y minutes?" format.

name: changelog
title: Generate Changelog
description: Analyze git history between tags/dates and produce a categorized changelog.

name: clip
title: AI-Powered Highlight Clipper
description: Analyzes screen recordings to find the most visually interesting moments (fast typing, terminal output, UI changes) and extracts them as clips.

name: cognitive
title: Cognitive Dashboard
description: Launch the terminal cognitive dashboard showing system state, services, and real-time metrics.

name: collab
title: Find Collaboration Opportunities
description: Identify potential collaboration targets: YouTubers, open source projects, communities in the sovereign AI niche.

name: commit
title: Smart Commit
description: Scan changes across repos, generate contextual commit message with ⟡ prefix. Does NOT push (use `/ship` for that).

name: community-post
title: Generate YouTube Community Post
description: Create engaging community posts (polls, updates, behind-scenes) to boost subscriber engagement.

name: comparison
title: Create Comparison Content
description: Generate "X vs Y" comparison content — the highest CTR format on YouTube.

name: compete
title: Analyze Competitor YouTube Channels
description: Analyze similar channels (Network Chuck, Fireship, ThePrimeagen, etc.) for what's working.

name: compress
title: Identify Compression Candidates
description: Find version chains, topic clusters, and redundant notes in the Vault. Draft compression nodes to consolidate.

name: content-calendar
title: Content Calendar Management
description: View, plan, and manage the content calendar for all platforms.

name: contract
title: Create Work Contract for Digital Coworkers
description: Create, list, or manage typed work contracts for the digital coworker runtime.

name: cost
title: API Spend & Resource Tracking
description: Track API costs, token usage, and compute spend across all AI services.

name: council
title: Multi-Perspective Review Council
description: Spawn 3 parallel review agents with different perspectives to evaluate a document, codebase, architecture, or idea. The council provides brutally honest feedback from multiple angles.

name: cta
title: Generate Call-to-Action Variants
description: Generate and test different CTAs for videos, posts, and pages.

name: daily-video
title: Compile & Upload Daily Build Log Video
description: Compile today's screen recordings into a YouTube video, upload, SEO optimize, generate Shorts, and cross-post everywhere.

name: decay
title: Check Staleness Thresholds
description: Check files against decay limits per Vault spec Part XX. List files exceeding staleness thresholds by layer.

name: demo
title: MirrorBrain Mobile App Demo
description: Run the full end-to-end MirrorBrain mobile demo on the Pixel. Navigates all 5 panes, dismisses the seed modal, and opens a live action tile.

name: dependency
title: Package & Dependency Audit
description: Run full dependency audit across brew, pip, npm, and Ollama. Includes vulnerability scanning.

name: deploy
title: Deploy LaunchAgents
description: Create, load, and verify LaunchAgents following MirrorDNA hardening standards.

name: device
title: Device Status Dashboard
description: Check reachability and status of all devices in the mesh.

name: distribution
title: Full Distribution Pipeline
description: Run the complete content distribution pipeline for today's content.

name: draft
title: Draft Content for Publishing
description: Create a content draft for a specific platform with proper structure and frontmatter.

name: dream
title: Run Dream Engine
description: Trigger the sovereign dream engine — processes vault notes, generates insights, creates new connections while Paul sleeps.

name: drift
title: Detect Configuration Drift
description: Compare all sources of truth against reality. Find where config says one thing but the system does another.

name: drip
title: Drip Content Publisher
description: Publish content on a timed drip schedule — space out posts for maximum algorithmic engagement.

name: emergency
title: Emergency Triage Protocol
description: Trigger Part XXV emergency triage. Freeze content creation, clear inbox, bulk park stale Active files.

name: endscreen
title: Optimize End Screens
description: Generate and apply optimal end screen configurations for YouTube videos.

name: engagement
title: Engagement Booster
description: Analyze and respond to engagement across all platforms to boost algorithmic ranking.

name: evergreen
title: Create Evergreen Content
description: Generate content that stays relevant and accumulates views over time (how-to, setup guides, comparisons).

name: evolve
title: Self-Improvement Cycle
description: Run a full self-improvement cycle: calibrate, identify weaknesses, propose improvements, implement if safe.

name: experiment
title: Run Controlled Experiments
description: Design and run A/B experiments on system behavior. Track hypothesis, method, results.

name: factory
title: Visual Orchestration Demo
description: Spawn multiple Claude Code agents in separate Terminal windows, each building a different component in parallel. One orchestrator managing the factory floor.

name: ffmpeg-reaper
title: Kill Zombie FFmpeg Processes
description: Kills ffmpeg screen recording processes older than 4 hours to prevent CPU exhaustion.

name: find
title: Smart Vault Search
description: Search the Vault by keyword or topic. Searches by layer priority: Canonical → Active → Reference → Archive.

name: focus
title: Set Current Project Focus
description: Update bus state with active project. Subsequent commands scope to that project context.

name: forensic
title: Full-Stack System Forensic
description: Deep 10-layer scan across the entire MirrorDNA stack. Supersedes health, status, pulse, smoke for comprehensive audits.

name: funnel
title: Content Funnel Analysis
description: Map the viewer journey from discovery to subscriber to community member.

name: glossary
title: Vault Glossary Management
description: Look up or add glossary terms for the MirrorDNA vocabulary.

name: glyph
title: AI-Native Signature & Provenance Mark
description: Apply the Active Mirror glyph signature to artifacts. The glyph is our machine-readable + human-readable identity mark — it goes on everything we publish.

name: growth
title: Growth Metrics Dashboard
description: Pull growth metrics from all platforms and generate trend analysis.

name: guardian
title: Mirror Guardian Check
description: Run the sovereign guardian — checks integrity, service health, and security posture.

name: handoff
title: Write Handoff for Next Client
description: Write a detailed handoff so the next client (Claude Desktop, AG, or human) can continue seamlessly.

name: hashtag
title: Research Optimal Hashtags
description: Find the best performing hashtags for sovereign AI / build-in-public niche across platforms.

name: headline
title: Generate Headlines & Titles
description: Power-generate 20 headline variants for any content using proven viral formulas.

name: health
title: System Health Check
description: Check all MirrorDNA services and report status.

name: history
title: Session History
description: Show session history from ledger and memory bus. Who did what, when.

name: hook
title: Generate Viral Video Hooks
description: Uses Ollama to generate 10 attention-grabbing hooks for YouTube videos. Tested against viral formulas (curiosity gap, contrarian take, number-driven, story-driven).

name: idea
title: Generate Content Ideas
description: AI-powered content ideation from vault knowledge, trending topics, and audience interests.

name: inbox-zero
title: Clear All Pending
description: Process ALL pending items across every inbox until zero remains or everything is explicitly deferred.

name: incident
title: Post-Mortem Generator
description: Generate a structured post-mortem from recent failures, heal logs, and pulse state.

name: inventory
title: Full System Inventory
description: Complete inventory of everything in the MirrorDNA stack: scripts, agents, skills, ports, repos, models, devices.

name: killswitch
title: Emergency Kill Switch
description: Activate or check the sovereign kill switch. Stops all non-essential services.

name: launch
title: Content Launch Sequence
description: Execute a coordinated multi-platform launch for a major piece of content.

name: link
title: Vault Link Management
description: Create, verify, and repair bidirectional links between Vault documents.

name: logs
title: View Service Logs
description: Tail MirrorDNA service logs for debugging and monitoring.

name: meta
title: Optimize Page Meta Tags
description: Audit and optimize meta tags (title, description, OG) across all web properties.

name: migrate
title: Move Notes Between Vault Layers
description: Move vault notes between layers (INBOX, ACTIVE, SHIPPED, PARKED, REFERENCE, ARCHIVE) with automatic frontmatter update.

name: milestone
title: Celebrate & Share Milestones
description: Auto-detect and celebrate milestones (subscriber count, days building, features shipped, etc.).

name: morning-push
title: Send Morning Briefing to Devices
description: Reads the latest overnight report and pushes it to OnePlus + Pixel via MirrorSignal + ADB.

name: network
title: Network Diagnostics
description: Check Tailscale, ports, SC1 bridges, DNS, and connectivity.

name: newsletter
title: Generate Weekly Newsletter
description: Compile the week's ships, videos, and insights into a newsletter for email subscribers.

name: niche-down
title: Niche Analysis & Positioning
description: Analyze Paul's unique positioning in the AI/tech YouTube space and optimize for it.

name: note
title: Quick Capture to Inbox
description: Create a timestamped note in `00_INBOX/` with proper frontmatter for later triage.

name: og-image
title: Generate Open Graph Images
description: Generate OG images for web pages and blog posts (shown when shared on social).

name: onboard
title: Generate Context Pack for New Agent
description: Create a minimal context pack so a new agent (Codex, Gemini, local model, digital coworker) can start working immediately.

name: optimize
title: Full Content Optimization Sweep
description: Run a comprehensive optimization pass on all YouTube videos and social profiles.

name: overnight
title: Queue Background Agent Tasks
description: Set up tasks to run via Claude Code background agents while Paul sleeps/works on other things.

name: paper
title: Generate Research Paper from System Capabilities
description: Turn shipped capabilities into publishable research artifacts.

name: phone-pull
title: Pull & Triage Files from OnePlus
description: Pull files Paul has dropped into the phone's dedicated DROP zone, unzip archives, and triage into vault project folders.

name: pickup
title: Continue From Last Handoff
description: Read the last handoff and continue the pending work without asking.

name: podcast
title: Extract Podcast Audio
description: Generate a podcast episode by extracting narration-worthy content and adding TTS.

name: pr
title: Create Pull Request
description: Generate PR title and body from commits, create via `gh pr create`.

name: promote
title: Promote Script to Managed Service
description: Take a standalone script and wire it into the full service stack: LaunchAgent + SERVICE_REGISTRY + health check.

name: prove
title: Generate Proof of Capability
description: Generate verifiable evidence that a claimed capability actually works. For papers, demos, and credibility.

name: pulse
title: Run a MirrorPulse health check and report results.
description: Run a MirrorPulse health check and report results.

name: quote-card
title: Generate Quotable Image Cards
description: Extract memorable quotes from vault notes and build logs, render as shareable image cards.

name: read
title: Follow a Read Path
description: Load and present a Vault read path — a curated sequence of documents for understanding a topic.

name: reaper
title: Staleness Reaper
description: Kill all staleness: ghost error logs, stale errors, bloated logs, crashed agents.

name: recap
title: Weekly/Monthly Content Recap
description: Generate a recap video + thread + blog post summarizing a week or month of building.

name: reflect
title: Meta-Analysis Mode
description: Review recent work, identify patterns, suggest next moves. Reads bus history and recent handoffs.

name: regression
title: Detect Performance Regressions
description: Compare current system performance against historical baselines. Flag anything that got worse.

name: release
title: Create Release
description: Full release cycle: tag, generate notes, publish via GitHub.

name: remix
title: Remix Old Content
description: Take older videos/posts and remix them with new footage, updated data, and fresh SEO.

name: replay
title: Replay Session from Witness Chain
description: Reconstruct what happened in a previous session using the witness chain and event logs.

name: repurpose
title: Repurpose Content Across Formats
description: Take one piece of content and multiply it into 7+ formats.

name: research
title: Deep Research
description: Search web and Vault, synthesize findings, optionally create a Reference note.

name: research-agents
title: Run MirrorResearch Intelligence Sweep
description: Collect RSS feeds, GitHub trending, and generate a daily research briefing.

name: retire
title: Gracefully Disable a Service
description: Stop a service, unload its LaunchAgent, move plist to disabled/, update SERVICE_REGISTRY.

name: review
title: Review Changes
description: Review a PR or local uncommitted changes. Show diff summary, flag issues, suggest improvements.

name: scaffold
title: Scaffold New Project
description: Create a new project with standard MirrorDNA structure and patterns.

name: schedule
title: Optimal Content Schedule
description: Calculate and set the optimal posting schedule based on audience analytics and platform algorithms.

name: schema
title: Add Structured Data / Schema.org
description: Add JSON-LD structured data to activemirror.ai for rich search results.

name: seo-aeo-aio
title: Triple Optimization Sweep
description: Optimize content for three discovery layers: traditional search (SEO), answer engines (AEO), and AI model training/retrieval (AIO).

name: seo-syndication
title: SEO & Content Syndication
description: Syndicates content with SEO optimization across platforms. Checks sitemap freshness.

name: series
title: Plan Content Series
description: Generate a multi-part content series plan optimized for YouTube algorithm (series get 3x more suggested views).

name: services
title: Manage MirrorDNA Services
description: List, start, or stop MirrorDNA services. Shows LaunchAgent status and offers control.

name: ship
title: Commit, Push, and Complete
description: Finalize current work: commit all changes, push to remote, write completion.

name: shorts
title: Generate YouTube Shorts from Recordings
description: Auto-clip daily recordings into 55-second vertical Shorts with text overlays, upload to YouTube.

name: signal
title: Send Notification via MirrorSignal
description: Send a notification to macOS + OnePlus + Pixel via the sovereign MirrorSignal service (port 8890).

name: sitemap
title: Regenerate Sitemaps
description: Regenerate and submit sitemaps for all Active Mirror domains.

name: smoke
title: Run Smoke Tests
description: Run smoke tests across all critical services and endpoints.

name: snapshot
title: System Snapshot
description: Capture a full system snapshot: services, ports, disk, memory, processes.

name: spec
title: Draft a New Spec Document
description: Create a scaffolded spec with frontmatter, sections, and verification checklist.

name: stack-video
title: Generate "My Stack" Video
description: Create a "Full Stack Tour" video showing the entire sovereign AI infrastructure.

name: standup
title: Morning Standup
description: Generate a concise briefing: what happened since last session, current state, today's priorities.

name: status
title: Quick Status Check
description: Lightweight status check — bus phase, inbox count, pending items, git dirty count. Faster than `/health`.

name: storytell
title: Narrative Content Generator
description: Transform technical build logs into compelling stories using narrative structure.

name: swarm
title: Swarm Coordinator Status & Control
description: Check concurrent agent sessions, detect conflicts, view swarm state.

name: sync
title: Synchronize State Across All Clients
description: Read all state files, reconcile, and report current system status.

name: tag
title: Tag Management
description: Manage Vault tags per Part XXIV. List tags, check for duplicates, add to registry.

name: test
title: Run Tests
description: Auto-detect test framework, run suite, report pass/fail, suggest fixes for failures.

name: thread
title: Turn Build Log into Social Thread
description: Converts today's build log into a viral Bluesky/X thread with hooks, visuals, and CTA.

name: thumbnail
title: AI-Generate Video Thumbnails
description: Generate click-worthy thumbnails using terminal screenshots + text overlays + contrast optimization.

name: timelapse
title: Create Coding Timelapse
description: Concatenate all day's recordings into a 60-90 second timelapse at 16x-32x speed with music-ready timing.

name: trending
title: Find Trending Topics in Niche
description: Scan Hacker News, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub trending for topics relevant to sovereign AI, local LLM, indie hacker, build-in-public.

name: triage
title: Auto-Triage Inbox
description: Scan `00_INBOX/` in the Vault, classify each item by type and urgency, move to the correct layer.

name: tutorial
title: Extract Tutorial from Build Log
description: Turn a build session into a step-by-step tutorial (video + blog + code).

name: velocity
title: Content Velocity Tracker
description: Track how fast content is being produced and distributed across all channels.

name: video-essay
title: Generate AI-Narrated Video Essay
description: Creates a video essay from vault content using Ollama for script generation and TTS for narration.

name: viral
title: Autonomous Viral Distribution Pipeline
description: Run the full viral engine: detect new ships, generate multi-format content, optimize for SEO+AEO+AIO, distribute across all channels.

name: viral-audit
title: Viral Readiness Audit
description: Score each video and post against viral readiness criteria.

name: weekly-video
title: Compile Weekly Recap Video
description: Generates a weekly compilation video from daily recordings and uploads to YouTube.

name: wire-check
title: Verify All AI Components Are Connected
description: End-to-end connectivity check across the full AI mesh: kernel, Ollama, OpenMemory, MirrorPulse, hooks, bus, models.

name: youtube-seo
title: AI-Native YouTube SEO Optimizer
description: Uses Ollama to generate optimized titles, descriptions, and tags for YouTube videos. Runs automatically after daily uploads.
